title: roettlera aromatica
intro: Roettlera aromatica, also known as Anisomeles ovata, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Roettlera aromatica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Roettlera aromatica is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
